caption: A news broadcast from News18 India depicts a press conference set against a backdrop featuring the "INDIA" logo and the text "NATIONAL DEVELOPMENTAL INCLUSIVE ALLIANCE" and "19 DECEMBER 2023 NEW DELHI." Several men are seated behind a long white table; one man in a white garment speaks into microphones, while others listen. Inset circular portraits identify "सुब्रात चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी." The screen displays a prominent "BREAKING NEWS" banner in yellow and red. The top headline reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," which changes in the lower frames to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की स" and "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The News18 India logo and a timestamp of "10:08 PM" are visible in the corners. Across the sequence, the camera remains static while the on-screen text updates and the people at the table shift slightly in their positions.
